text:
Maenole (マエノレ, Maenore) was a Chimera Ant Peon Soldier in Welfin's division. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 261 

Appearance

Maenole was a muscular Chimera Ant with an elongated head. He had four arms; two appeared more human-like, and the other two were smaller in size and more insect-esque. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

While in East Gorteau's royal palace, Welfin receives a telepathic message reporting an emergency and asking him to take caution from Maenole and Inzagi, who were on patrol. Welfin mentally complains about their signals hurting his ears and not making sense as he heads to the scene to investigate. At the scene of the incident, Welfin spots a bloodstain and a pair of shoes. The blood smelled like the blood of Taragetter, another peon of his, and the shoes were identified as belonging to someone else, an intruder. After some contemplation, Welfin identifies a scent trail, and telepathically orders Maenole and Inzagi to come with him. The two are seen following Welfin, although they are not seen when Welfin reaches the end of the scent trail. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 262 

Mere seconds after the Extermination Team infiltrate the palace, Maenole and Inzagi coincidentally head down a path that would have them spot Ikalgo piloting the corpse of a deceased Flutter. Out of the corner of his eye, Killua spots the two and quickly destroys their heads with yo-yos before they could see Ikalgo-Flutter, before turning back and heading to his original target. Unbeknownst to Killua, Welfin witnessed the entire process. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 269 

While running back, Killua and Ikalgo-Flutter exchange looks, as the corpses of Maenole and Inzagi start to fall. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 270 Shortly after, Welfin would think over what he had witnessed, and conjecture that Flutter had been spared because he was now a traitor. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 26, Chapter 271 Hours later, while searching for a new corpse to utilize, Ikalgo encounters the corpses of the peons, but deems their corpses too mangled to manipulate using his Living Dead Dolls. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 29, Chapter 304 

Abilities & Powers

As a Chimera Ant, Maenole is stronger than the average human. He has shown the ability to release his mandibles, revealing several sharp teeth and a long tongue. 

Despite having mouth-like features, Maenole is only shown communicating telepathically.
